plugins.cameraPermission: Allow Asset-Capture to use your camera to identify assets and liabilities while you walk through a location.

plugins.photosPermission: Allow Asset-Capture to save item photos to your registry.
plugins.cameraPermission: Allow Asset-Capture to capture photos of assets, ID tags, and markings.

infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Asset-Capture uses the camera to identify and document high-value assets and liabilities.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Asset-Capture saves photos of captured assets and ID tags.
